strength.name: Lateral Raise
strength.description:
3x10 | Slight bend in elbows
Arms stay slightly in front
Pinkies up
Reach out to sides, not up

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
EMOM x 15 mins
MIn 1: 12 Burpees
Min 2: 12 DB Box Overs @ 22.5/15kg x1
Min 3: Max C2B Pull Ups
Min4: Rest
*Burpees finish with arms overhead and hips/knees locked out.

hypertrophy.reasoning: Balance pushing overload from burpees/pull-ups; address posterior chain neglect; avoid compounding leg and arm fatigue.

siri_text: Tuesday's workout. Strength: Back Squat, 4 by 8 at 50 percent. Strength: Hack Squat, 3 by 10. Strength: Lateral Raise, 3 by 10. Strength: DB Bicep Curl, 3 by 10. Metcon: EMOM 15 minutes: *Burpees finish with arms overhead and hips/knees locked out.. For hypertrophy, focus on rear delts, back (rows), triceps.
